level1.name: angstrom.n.01
level1.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

level1.name: idea.n.01
level1.definition: the content of cognition; the main thing you are thinking about

level1.name: preserve.n.01
level1.definition: a domain that seems to be specially reserved for someone

level1.name: algorithm.n.01
level1.definition: a precise rule (or set of rules) specifying how to solve some problem

level1.name: model.n.01
level1.definition: a hypothetical description of a complex entity or process

level1.name: second.n.01
level1.definition: 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites

level1.name: mistake.n.01
level1.definition: a wrong action attributable to bad judgment or ignorance or inattention

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level2.name: content.n.05
level2.definition: the sum or range of what has been perceived, discovered, or learned

level2.name: matter.n.06
level2.definition: written works (especially in books or magazines)

level2.name: sphere.n.01
level2.definition: a particular environment or walk of life

level2.name: rule.n.11
level2.definition: (mathematics) a standard procedure for solving a class of mathematical problems

level2.name: understand.v.01
level2.definition: know and comprehend the nature or meaning of

level2.name: hypothesis.n.02
level2.definition: a tentative insight into the natural world; a concept that is not yet verified but that if true would explain certain facts or phenomena

level2.name: time_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a unit for measuring time periods

level2.name: nonaccomplishment.n.01
level2.definition: an act that does not achieve its intended goal

level2.name: examination.n.01
level2.definition: the act of examining something closely (as for mistakes)

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level3.name: cognition.n.01
level3.definition: the psychological result of perception and learning and reasoning

level3.name: writing.n.02
level3.definition: the work of a writer; anything expressed in letters of the alphabet (especially when considered from the point of view of style and effect)

level3.name: procedure.n.01
level3.definition: a particular course of action intended to achieve a result

level3.name: concept.n.01
level3.definition: an abstract or general idea inferred or derived from specific instances

level3.name: measure.n.02
level3.definition: how much there is or how many there are of something that you can quantify

level3.name: investigation.n.02
level3.definition: the work of inquiring into something thoroughly and systematically

level4.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level4.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level4.name: written_communication.n.01
level4.definition: communication by means of written symbols (either printed or handwritten)

level4.name: idea.n.01
level4.definition: the content of cognition; the main thing you are thinking about

level4.name: work.n.01
level4.definition: activity directed toward making or doing something

top_concepts.definition: the content of cognition; the main thing you are thinking about

top_concepts.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

top_concepts.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms
